The '''''Ram's Head''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], the first and only ship to be outfitted with the experimental [[Shield X]] deflector shield.

==History==
[[File:Ramsheadoperation.png|thumb|left|200px|The ''Ram's Head'', about to smash into an ''[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial]]''{{'s}} command tower.]]

Prior to its capture by the Rebellion, it was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] corvette known as '''''Blade 5'''''. It was stolen and used to ram an array of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] docked in a [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]]. [[Technician/Legends|Technicians]] aboard the CR90 Corvette ''[[Libra]]'' modified it to lock coordinates on the shipyard, thus destroying all of the Star Destroyers in a row.

It is unknown what became of the ''Ram's Head'' as it was last seen flying into unknown space after the shipyard attack, still intact.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
